name: pi-harness
description: Monorepo for @vinciwu557 pi extension, skill, prompt, and theme packages.
author: VinciWu557

scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run check:boundaries && npm run typecheck && npm test
scripts.bump:patch: gh workflow run bump-version.yml --repo VinciWu557/pi-harness -f version_bump=patch
scripts.bump:minor: gh workflow run bump-version.yml --repo VinciWu557/pi-harness -f version_bump=minor
scripts.bump:major: gh workflow run bump-version.yml --repo VinciWu557/pi-harness -f version_bump=major
scripts.release:ci: gh workflow run release.yml --repo VinciWu557/pi-harness -f tag=v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")
